productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Boys Printed Black T-shirt
description: Composition Black T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neckline, short sleeves and graphic print on the front Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours and mild detergent Wash/dry inside out Do not tumble dry Use warm iron; Do not iron on decoration Remove all detachable accessories before washing Get your little one ready for a trip out in this T-shirt from palm tree. The print on the front adds to the cool vibe, while the cotton fabric keeps him feeling fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with shorts and comfy footwear for a happy, casual outing with his pals.
